what_worked_well.observation: Markdown specification tests using Bash+Grep patterns worked well for structural validation per test-automator.md guidance
what_worked_well.impact: Bash+Grep test patterns provide robust structural validation for Markdown specifications without requiring executable test frameworks, enabling TDD for documentation files

areas_for_improvement.issue: Implementation Notes template uses subsection format that DoD validator rejects
areas_for_improvement.evidence: .claude/skills/devforgeai-development/assets/templates/implementation-notes-template.md:7-8 shows '### Definition of Done Status' header, but dod-update-workflow.md:117-146 explicitly states validator stops at first ### header
areas_for_improvement.root_cause: Template was created before validator flat-list requirement was documented; template never updated to match validator behavior

recommendations.title: Fix Implementation Notes template to use flat checklist format
recommendations.description: Update implementation-notes-template.md to remove the '### Definition of Done Status' subsection header and place DoD items as a flat checklist directly under '## Implementation Notes'.

recommendations.title: Add cross-reference from template to dod-update-workflow.md format spec
recommendations.description: Add a documentation link in the template file pointing to dod-update-workflow.md lines 117-166 explaining why flat format is required.

recommendations.title: Document Bash+Grep test pattern for Markdown specifications in coding-standards.md
recommendations.description: Add a section to coding-standards.md documenting the Bash+Grep structural test pattern that worked well for STORY-192.

patterns_observed: Bash+Grep structural testing pattern effective for Markdown specifications
Test-automator.md guidance for specification file testing followed successfully
Phase state tracking captured observations correctly throughout workflow
anti_patterns_detected: Template file contradicts validator requirements documented in same skill directory
constraint_analysis: The dod-update-workflow.md constraint document effectively documents the flat checklist requirement (lines 117-166), but the template file was not updated to match. Context file cross-referencing prevented friction during development because developer read dod-update-workflow.md and used correct format despite incorrect template.
